observed_finding: The clean-source D009 run completed the first shared 1,024-row synthetic projection, then the Windows peak-working-set probe raised OSError before validation projection, either projected-kernel head, any matched control, or admission evaluation completed.
bounded_interpretation: This is a process-memory telemetry interface failure. It does not show that Q01b or FQK works or fails, and it does not show that the frozen workload fits or exceeds the laptop limits.
future_research_improvement: A later prospective protocol should validate a correctly typed Windows process-memory adapter against an independent OS reading before launching the full preflight, retain a fail-closed missing-telemetry path, bind provenance to committed Git blobs independently of checkout line endings, and leave all D008 scientific rows, models, controls, and thresholds unchanged.

observed_finding: Q01b completed the frozen selected-seed campaign but did not meet the promising rule: mean relative NRMSE gap versus C06 = 95.76936119306231, qualified dequantization regimes = 0.
bounded_interpretation: This is a valid development-only negative for the exact P001 feature map and frozen benchmark, not evidence that every projected quantum kernel or feasibility-learning approach fails.
future_research_improvement: A future protocol should prospectively compare richer local observable projections or task-informed encodings selected without outcome reuse, while preserving A02, random-feature, compressed-MLP, and physics-residual controls.

observed_finding: PRQK-08-N completed all five folds and 20 seeds but had mean pooled OOF NRMSE 0.0293259 versus C06 0.00683281; the paired difference was +0.0224931 with a 95% interval entirely above zero, and regret, infeasible selection, and safety conditions failed. A02-R-q8 scored 0.0265477.
bounded_interpretation: This is a valid development-only negative for physics-anchored local projected-kernel residual learning. It does not show that every QML residual, quantum kernel, or hybrid method fails, and it does not revise Gate 5 or authorize Gate 6.
future_research_improvement: A new prospective protocol may test a cross-fitted quantum correction stacked on the frozen C06 predictor, with an identical-input classical stacked RBF control, while preserving the grouped split, 20-seed endpoint, safety metrics, resource limits, and zero locked-data reads.
